channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A doctor shortage is coming. AI could be the only realistic fix
item.description: With 86,000 clinicians missing by 2036 and physicians spending less than a third of time on patients, AI offers a hopeful solution for medicine's structural issues.

item.title: The bond market is firing a warning shot in the direction of Washington, D.C.
item.description: Everything you need to know before you reach the office this morning.

item.title: How Metropolis built a $5 billion AI infrastructure company out of America's parking problem
item.description: CEO Alex Israel says the company's recognition economy thesis could reshape physical infrastructure, blending computer vision, biometrics, and next-generation technology.

item.title: CEOs distribute AI tokens like paychecks, then seek ways to justify the expense
item.description: Plus: All the latest news and office chatter from Fortune.
